title: phlox drummondii subsp. eudrummondii
intro: Phlox drummondii subsp. eudrummondii, also known as Drummond's phlox, is a type of flowering plant native to Central and North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phlox drummondii subsp. eudrummondii include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
